healthlake.fhirdatastore.CfnAbout:
Creates a Data Store that can ingest and export FHIR formatted data.

**Important**  
Please note that when a user tries to do an Update operation via CloudFormation, changes to the Data Store name, Type Version, PreloadDataConfig, or SSEConfiguration will delete their existing Data Store for the stack and create a new one. This will lead to potential loss of data.

healthlake.fhirdatastore.DatastoreName.Description: The user generated name for the data store.

healthlake.fhirdatastore.DatastoreTypeVe.Description: The FHIR version of the data store. The only supported version is R4.

healthlake.fhirdatastore.PreloadDataConf.Description: The preloaded data configuration for the data store. Only data preloaded from Synthea is supported.

healthlake.fhirdatastore.SseConfiguratio.Description: The server-side encryption key configuration for a customer provided encryption key specified for creating a data store.

healthlake.fhirdatastore.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
